fields.doc: CoreTX NFT contract address (for cross-contract minting)
fields.name: nft_contract

udt_union_v0.doc: Storage keys for the Nether Proof contract
udt_union_v0.name: DataKey

void_v0.doc: Total number of verified seals issued (Instance storage)
void_v0.name: SealCount

tuple_v0.doc: Active commitment for a player (Temporary storage \xe2\x80\x94 auto-expires)
tuple_v0.name: Commitment

tuple_v0.doc: Verified seal by index for a player (Persistent storage)
tuple_v0.name: Seal

tuple_v0.doc: Total seals earned by a specific player (Persistent storage)
tuple_v0.name: PlayerSealCount

fields.doc: Whether the commitment has been revealed
fields.name: revealed

fields.doc: SHA-256 hash of the game result data
fields.name: seal_hash

fields.doc: Ledger timestamp when commitment was made
fields.name: timestamp

fields.doc: Whether the seal has been verified on-chain
fields.name: verified

cases.doc: Caller is not the contract admin
cases.name: NotAuthorized

cases.doc: Player already has an active (unrevealed) commitment
cases.name: CommitmentExists

cases.doc: No commitment found (expired or never created)
cases.name: NoCommitment

cases.doc: Hash of revealed data doesn't match commitment
cases.name: SealMismatch

cases.doc: Seal not found at the given index
cases.name: SealNotFound

cases.doc: Score value out of valid range
cases.name: InvalidScore

cases.doc: Wisdom value out of valid range (0\xe2\x80\x935)
cases.name: InvalidWisdom

function_v0.doc:
Player commits their Nether Seal hash after completing the game.

The seal_hash is SHA-256(PIKO-NETHER|score:X|wisdom:Y|time:Z|ts:T)
computed client-side. The contract stores it in Temporary storage
with a ~24h TTL \xe2\x80\x94 if not revealed in time, the commitment expires.
function_v0.name: commit

function_v0.doc:
Player reveals their game results. Contract verifies hash match.

Uses env.crypto().sha256() (host-optimized) to recompute the hash
from revealed values and compare against the stored commitment.
function_v0.name: reveal

function_v0.doc: Get a specific verified seal by player and index.
function_v0.name: get_seal

function_v0.doc: Initialize the contract. Must be called once after deployment.
function_v0.name: initialize

function_v0.doc: Get the total number of verified seals across all players.
function_v0.name: total_seals

function_v0.doc: Get the number of seals a specific player has earned.
function_v0.name: player_seals

function_v0.doc: Check if a player has an active (unrevealed) commitment.
function_v0.name: has_commitment

function_v0.doc: Transfer admin to a new address (admin only).
function_v0.name: transfer_admin

function_v0.doc: Update the NFT contract address (admin only).
function_v0.name: set_nft_contract
